metadata.original_prompt: Create a summary of the project architecture and save it as a text file in my Downloads/shinobu directory.

tasks.title: Locate and read project_architecture_summary.txt
tasks.description: Navigate to the specified file path /Downloads/shinobu/project_architecture_summary.txt and retrieve its contents.

tasks.title: Analyze content of project architecture file
tasks.description: Review and understand the structure, components, and relationships described in the project architecture summary.

tasks.title: Generate concise project architecture summary
tasks.description: Extract key points and create a clear, organized summary of the project architecture based on the original file.

tasks.title: Save summary as text file in ~/Downloads/shinobu/
tasks.description: Create a new text file named 'project_architecture_summary.txt' (or update if exists) in the ~/Downloads/shinobu/ directory with the generated summary content.

pending_steps.title: Analyze content of project architecture file
Save summary as text file in ~/Downloads/shinobu/
